programme.title: Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa Ep13
programme.desc: Maisara cemburu melihat Nazril dan Nurul Huda bersama. Kerana Nazril tidak mahu menyakiti hati isterinya, dia menyatakan perkahwinan mereka bahagia di depan Nurul Huda dan yang lain, demi Maisara.

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 36
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 3
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 112
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 25
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 3
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 4
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 77
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 5
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 6
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 5
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 78
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.title: Kana Kandaen
programme.desc: Bhaskar and Archana seek Madan's help to fund Bhaskar's post-graduate project but the truth about Madan is soon revealed. Starring Srikanth, Gopika.

programme.title: Kulasami
programme.desc: When a man loses his younger sister to a gang that lures college girls into sex work, he begins to scheme a revenge plan. Starring Vimal and Tanya Hope.

programme.title: Ninaivirukkum Varai
programme.desc: Jani, a rowdy, falls in love with Sandhya but does not express his love for fear of losing her friendship. But he tries to break up her marriage when he learns a shocking truth about her groom.

programme.title: Rekka
programme.desc: A young man haunted by his actions in the past gets caught in the rivalry between two gangsters. Starring Vijay Sethupathi, Lakshmi Menon, KS Ravikumar & many more.

programme.title: Boss Engira Bhaskaran
programme.desc: An easygoing unemployed man drifts through life without purpose. When he falls in love, he confronts his flaws, changes his ways, and reshapes his future for marriage. Starring Arya & Nayanthara.

programme.title: Anbanavan Asaradhavan Adangadhavan
programme.desc: Michael, a criminal leader, gives up a life of crime and settles in Chennai under a different name. He soon falls in love with a woman but learns that she wants to marry a man who looks just like him.

programme.title: Three Roses
programme.desc: When Charulatha, Nandhu and Pooja return from abroad, they find out that their friend has been arrested for travelling on a fake passport. Cast : Rambha, Laila & Jyothika

programme.title: Raasi
programme.desc: Kumar, a young man, falls in love with Meena, his uncle's daughter. Complications come to light when he is unable to shell out enough money for an important occasion.

programme.title: Ayudha Poojai
programme.desc: Krishnasamy strives to change and reunite with his family. Cast : Arjun & Roja

programme.title: Laandhar
programme.desc: ACP Aravind faces a bizarre case, a limping, raincoated figure with a shovel attacks people like a zombie. As fear spreads, Aravind must uncover the truth behind this eerie menace and its violent behaviour

programme.title: Sethu
programme.desc: A violent college student softens his tough exterior when he falls in love with a shy Brahmin woman. However, tragedy strikes when he suffers a serious brain injury in a brutal fight. Starring Vikram

programme.title: Paramapadham Vilayattu
programme.desc: When a politician mysteriously dies in her care, Dr Gayathri decides to investigate. However, when she learns of the conspiracy behind his death, she must decide whether to speak up or not.

programme.title: Uttama Villain
programme.desc: Manoranjan, a superstar, is diagnosed with a brain tumour. However, as a last wish, he sets out to shoot a comedy film with his mentor, Margadarsi, with whom he had a falling out years ago.

programme.title: Samar
programme.desc: Shankar and Roopa fall in love with each other but she suddenly ends their relationship and moves out of the country. Shankar receives a mysterious invitation from Roopa to come to Bangkok. Starring Vishal

programme.title: Unnai Ninaithu
programme.desc: Radha, the daughter of a hotel manager, falls in love with Suriya, who works as a receptionist. However, things turn upside down when Suriya's ex-lover comes back to his life. Starring Suriya and Sneha.

programme.title: Kuselan
programme.desc: A poor barber lives a peaceful and content life with his caring wife and beautiful kids; but he faces a dilemma when his childhood friend returns to his village as a popular movie star.Starring Rajinikanth

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: Wonder Woman battles Maxwell Lord, an evil businessman, and Barbara Minerva, her friend-turned-foe, who wreak havoc on the world through a wish-granting artefact.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

programme.title: Muka Ketat Baju Ketat
programme.desc: Irwan, seorang lelaki yang kacak, namun sentiasa bermuka ketat. Beliau tinggal bersama bapa saudaranya, Sham di Kuala Lumpur. Perwatakan Sham berbeza dengan Irwan, beliau selalu menjaga penampilannya dan sentiasa tersenyum. Masalah timbul apabila teman wanta Irwan jatuh hati kepada Sham. Lakonan : Kazar, Muniff Isa, Leez AF, Amyzna Adnan dan Julia Ziegler.

After years of anticipation, Maddie and Chimney's long-awaited wedding day arrives; when the groom mysteriously vanishes, the 118 races against time to ensure he doesn't miss the most crucial day of his life.
Maddie and Athena investigate a case surrounding an abducted mother and child; Hen and Karen learn more about Mara's family history; Eddie grapples with unresolved feelings for someone from his past.

After a victim of the apartment fire that changed Bobby's life resurfaces, he searches to make amends; driven by his need to right past wrongs, Bobby delves deep into memories of his childhood, unearthing moments from his fractured past.

The 118 and Tommy are presented with the Medal of Valor for their work on the cruise ship rescue; Hen and Karen encounter an unforeseen hurdle in their foster care journey; Eddie's emotional affair develops further.

Following the devastating fire at the Nash home, Bobby's fate remains uncertain; Athena embarks on a mission to uncover the truth; Hen and Karin engage in a heated custody battle; Christopher grapples with forgiving Eddie.
A trailer with millions of bees crashes on the streets of Los Angeles, unleashing a swarm.
Athena is tasked with safely delivering a prisoner to testify on a high-profile case; a light plane is hit by a swarm of bees and careens into a passenger plane.
Athena's only chance of surviving and saving everyone on the flight is to attempt to land the plane before it crashes and call on the 118 for help.
When it finally looks like Hen and Karen may get their foster license back, they are hit with another obstacle; the 118 races to the aid of a cheerleader involved in an infield collision.
The 118 is once again working on the spookiest night of the year and missing out on all the tricks and treats; Buck's Halloween decorations become a little scarier than he had hoped.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep05

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep08

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep09

Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: (Live) Hello Singapore - EP 67 / 狮城有约
programme.desc: Delivering the day's latest news and social features that matter to you. Every Monday to Friday, from 6.30pm to 7.30pm on Channel 8.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 12 / 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Zhang Tie is troubled by the Harbour Orchestra’s lack of a conductor. Finding the situation suspicious, she suspects it is Ouyang Zong’s scheme but is left with no choice but to negotiate with him for the loan of Xiaocheng, while also having to face an unfair card game.

programme.title: ER 24/7 - EP 4 / 命悬一线
programme.desc: At the front lines between life and death, emergency care is more than technical skill — it is a test of dignity and choice. This episode follows emergency teams in Singapore and Thailand as they navigate high-speed rescues and constrained realities. When saving at all costs meets the right to a dignified death, they face their hardest decisions.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 4 / 至死不渝
programme.desc: Julian accuses Haoshuai of killing Jenna. Police suspect she had a boyfriend and later learn she was pregnant, and Julian is revealed to be the father. Keying spots a woman like Dr. Su at her father’s grave and suspects Dr. Su might be her biological mother. Shuheng chases Jenna’s obsessed fan, who flees. At his home, the police are shocked to find a head in the pot, only Shuheng remains calm.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Focus - EP 14 / 焦点
programme.desc: Focus provides timely reports and analyses on international news and current affairs from Singapore's perspective.

programme.title: Swords into Plowshares - EP 47 / 太平年
programme.desc: The narrative follows three young heroes — Zhao Kuangyin, Qian Hongchu, and Guo Rong — who navigate the chaos of war to unite rival states. Their journey of friendship, sacrifice, and the quest for peace offers a rich, emotionally engaging experience for viewers.

programme.title: The Legend of Heroes - Hot Blooded - EP 12 / 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心
programme.desc: The foolish young lad, Guo Jing, ultimately matures into a national hero who stands for the country and the people, embodying the true essence of chivalry.

programme.title: Camping Around The World - EP 3 / 在世界的角落扎营
programme.desc: Local celebrities Qi Yuwu and Joanne Peh enjoyed their first outdoor camping experience on Ja-eundo Island in Jeollanam-do, South Korea, reliving romantic moments while biking, horseback riding, and exploring mudflats to catch octopus, dig for clams, and experience salt farming.

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 13 / 正义武馆
programme.desc: This is a freshly repackaged classic drama, with Chinese Martial Arts as its main selling point. Infused with the touch of pugilistic novels, an emphasis on feelings of righteousness, and glimpses of how legends are created.

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 14 / 正义武馆
programme.desc: This is a freshly repackaged classic drama, with Chinese Martial Arts as its main selling point. Infused with the touch of pugilistic novels, an emphasis on feelings of righteousness, and glimpses of how legends are created.

programme.title: Rookies' Kitchen - EP 3 / 上蔡乐
programme.desc: Nyonya cuisine uses a lot of spices, which must be mashed by hand. This is a big challenge for the hosts. They learned to cook Nyonya Chap Chye and Sambal Udang Petai from Danial, a local private chef. They finished with a thrill, but the dishes drew bad reviews from the guests. What went wrong?

programme.title: News Tonight / 晚间新闻

programme.title: My One And Only - EP 30 / 只此一家
programme.desc: Renpin buys Leia a pair of limited-edition earrings in Bangkok. He arrives home to see Leia kissing Lucas and is shattered by her betrayal. Baoyou continues making films on haunted houses and gets Zixiong involved. Haojian realises Yurou doesn't know her husband Lucas is having an affair with Leia. Limin receives shocking news after her medical checkup.

programme.title: Carrick: The Players' Player
programme.desc: A special documentary on United first team star Michael Carrick. In over a decade at the club Carrick has won everything and proven to be a model professional.

programme.title: Carrick: Life Before United
programme.desc: Michael Carrick discusses his life and career prior to his move to Old Trafford in 2006. The midfielder grew up in Newcastle and later enjoyed successful stints at West Ham & Tottenham.

programme.title: Tony Whelan: The Godfather
programme.desc: Tony Whelan, our Academy Programme Advisor, speaks to Danny Webber about his legendary career as a Manchester United player, coach and mentor.

programme.title: Eric Harrison's Class of '92
programme.desc: Special documentary looking back at the fantastic FA Youth Cup winning side of 1992, that yielded the likes of Beckham, Neville and Butt.

programme.title: Star Maker: The Jimmy Murphy Story
programme.desc: On the 63rd anniversary of Munich we remember one of the greatest coaches in Manchester United history, the man who brought through the Busby Babes and let the club in the aftermath of the tragedy.

programme.title: Jimmy Murphy - Sculpting A Hero
programme.desc: Follow the emotional journey of Jimmy Murphy's statue from its conception in Edinburgh to its final resting place, proudly on the Stretford End.

programme.title: 1999: Road To European Glory
programme.desc: Re-live United's famous journey to the Nou Camp as they conquered Europe during the Treble season.

programme.title: Fergie's First XI
programme.desc: A special documentary looking back at the very first XI selected by Sir Alex Ferguson to play against Oxford United in November 1986. Presented by Jim Rosenthal.

programme.title: Leadership: Sir Alex Ferguson
programme.desc: Our former manager reveals the secrets behind his record-breaking career in his book "Leading". He discusses this and more in this special interview.

programme.title: Wembley '77: Que Sera Sera...
programme.desc: Exclusive documentary looking back at one of the most significant FA Cup finals in United's history. This is the story of how the team bounced back from defeat, in this showpiece occasion.

programme.title: Scholesy: In A League Of His Own
programme.desc: Manchester United is extremely sad that our former youth coach Eric Harrison has passed away. This is a profile of one of the many great players that Eric developed for United stardom.

programme.title: Dennis Viollet: A United Man
programme.desc: On the 60th anniversary of Munich, this is the story of prolific striker and United legend Dennis Viollet. He was part of the Busby Babes team and a Munich Air Disaster survivor.

programme.title: Sir Bobby - The Greatest
programme.desc: On the 63rd anniversary of Munich, this special documentary paid tribute to one of football's and United's all-time greats who survived the Air Disaster.

programme.title: Busby's Dream: The Triumph of '68
programme.desc: Special documentary featuring the players, fans' stories and unseen archive from one of United's greatest triumphs, the 1968 European Cup win.

programme.title: Schmeichel
programme.desc: Documentary looking back at the career of Peter Schmeichel, who is regarded by many as the greatest keeper ever to play the game.

programme.title: Carrick: The Players' Player
programme.desc: A special documentary on United first team star Michael Carrick. In over a decade at the club Carrick has won everything and proven to be a model professional.

programme.title: Fearless
programme.desc: Big Norm' is a cult hero at Old Trafford. He was a teenage sensation in the 1980s and an FA Cup winner. This film traces his upbringing in Belfast and his fantastic career, that ended prematurely.

programme.title: Scholesy: In A League Of His Own
programme.desc: Manchester United is extremely sad that our former youth coach Eric Harrison has passed away. This is a profile of one of the many great players that Eric developed for United stardom.

programme.title: Diary of a Lady-killer
programme.desc: A man is arrested after every woman he had sexual trysts with ends up dead shortly afterwards but the murders continue.

programme.title: The Duel of the Century
programme.desc: Two men find more than they bargained for when they attempt to investigate the apparent murder of a swordsman.

programme.title: Fangs of the Cobra
programme.desc: Follow a virtuous viper as it sniffs out bombs, fights gangs, battles a baby-killing rodent and even takes on a dangerous lady in this thriller!

programme.title: Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: An old grudge between the families of the Ching and Ming supporters in Kwang Tung, finally draws a young man back to avenge his father's death.

programme.title: The Adventures of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Based on the folk legend, director Li Han Hsiang presents this humorous portrayal of the Emperor Chien Lung's adventures in Jiang Nan.

programme.title: The Magnificent Ruffians
programme.desc: In this gem from Chang Cheh, it's a battle between security agencies and five powerful fighters as they brawl until the last drop of blood is spilled.

programme.title: Spring Blossoms
programme.desc: Three single females and the men they fall for think things are simple and blissful until the lasses' parents enter into the picture.

programme.title: The Bells of Death
programme.desc: A man devotes his life to mastering the sword in order to exact revenge on the three men who killed his family and abducted his sister.

programme.title: The Knight of Knights
programme.desc: In seeking to avenge his six comrades' murders, a swordsman must battle against Qiao Qing Monastery's notorious monks.

programme.title: The Deadly Knives
programme.desc: Two lovers who return to announce their marriage plans discover that their families are in conflict over land. Can they mend this broken bond?

programme.title: Hell Has No Boundary
programme.desc: When a detective's bullet changes direction in mid-air to zero in on its target, a terrifying supernatural connection comes to light.

programme.title: The Silver Fox
programme.desc: Actress Lily Ho plays the feared swordswoman Silver Fox, who witnessed her father senseless maiming and her mother's rape. 18 years later, it's payback time.

programme.title: The Dancing Millionairess
programme.desc: One of the most enjoyable musicals to grace the Hong Kong screen, this classic stars the husband-and-wife team of Peter Chen and Betty Loh.

programme.title: Five Shaolin Masters
programme.desc: 5 Shaolin rebels train hard in order to successfully defeat their Manchu enemies. Starring David Chiang, Ti Lung, Alexander Fu.

programme.title: Call to Arms
programme.desc: As the aggressive Chin Empire conquers the Chao Kingdom and drains the Wei empire, adventure, intrigue and tragedy abound as the armies march into battle.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Wong Yue and Gordon Liu star in this entertaining 'hopping vampire' action comedy.

programme.title: The Golden Buddha
programme.desc: A ruthless gang goes up against a millionaire's daughter who has one of three priceless Golden Buddha statues.

programme.title: The Yellow Muffler
programme.desc: This Inoue Umetsugu musical depicts the struggle of two singing sisters, Ching Ping and Pai Hung.

programme.title: Chinatown Kid
programme.desc: A man on the run (Fu Sheng) learns that heroism is likely to lead to nihilistic desecration.

programme.title: The Kingdom and the Beauty
programme.desc: Catch superstar, Linda Lin Dai, in one of her most acclaimed roles in this story of forbidden love between a country maiden and the emperor.

programme.title: The Eight Diagram Pole Fighter
programme.desc: Martial arts greats Lau Kar Leung and Alexander Fu play out the vendetta of General Yang and the creation of the unique eight-diagram pole fight technique.

programme.title: Asia-pol
programme.desc: Asiapol agent Yang Ming Hsuan sets out to apprehend George Eaton, a high profile thug who has escaped to Hong Kong. With home support, can Yang take him down?

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Director Chang Cheh joins forces with Ni Kuang and martial arts choreographer Liu Chia-liang to craft this brilliant saga from the golden age of kung fu films.

programme.title: The Happiest Moment
programme.desc: Directed by Lee Han-hsiang and starring Michael Hui, this blockbuster confirms Hui's versatile talents as the king of comedy.

programme.title: Brothers From the Walled City
programme.desc: The lives of two very different brothers intertwine when they find themselves the target of a vengeful inspector.

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: A traitorous clansman bids to locate and then unleash the deadly 'Five Venom Spider' against those who bid to stand in his way.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Directed by Ho Meng Hua, this film depicts the currents that buoy two families, sweeping them toward revenge in the wake of an unexpected reunion.

programme.title: Love With the Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: Pauline Wong plays a pregnant student who marries a sympathetic, yet equally heartbroken, passer-by in Jamie Luk's directing debut.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Betty Ting Pei plays a girl hiding from her father while working as a club singer in Japan. Then her father sends someone for her only for the man to fall in love with her.

programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys, so his friends make a movie to show that sharing can be fun.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Mia writes a musical about her family for a school project; she sings about how special it is to grow up in a family with two different cultures.

programme.desc: Prince Wednesday wishes he weren't so little; Daniel helps Dad build a playhouse.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
